BYD is now entering the European Taxi market.

German company has developed a taxi modification kit for Seal 06 DM-i Touring to allow it be used in Germany Taxi mkt. It has 130 km+ EV range & 1350 km combined range. https://t.co/CFH3Xp1ihQ

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:

It is also launching Song Ultra EV next wk & this will be a very popular SUV I think. https://t.co/FdVU4LEAn1

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD is actually seeing surging demand across the world due to the oil px & gasoline shortages.
